w:r.w:t: This is written so it can be
directly submitted to management / board / academic committee
Introduces AI, IoT, and Python using daily-life examples students relate to

what is allowed vs not allowed
Using AI to turn ideas into short stories

Taking user input and displaying output
Exploring IoT devices at home and school
Learning what data is using simple examples
Conceptual design of an IoT-based room
Understanding incorrect or biased AI responses
What is list, and how it works
AI systems, IoT architecture, security, ethics, case studies
Data handling, automation logic, Python programming, AI-assisted improvement
